senses.gloss: except (for), save (for), but (for), barring; other than, besides, apart from

examples.english: I could see them all except you.

examples.text: لَوْ كَانَ فِيهِمَا ءَالِهَةٌ إِلَّا ٱللَّهُ لَفَسَدَتَا فَسُبْحَـٰنَ ٱللَّهِ رَبِّ ٱلْعَرْشِ عَمَّا يَصِفُونَ
examples.english: Had there been within them [i.e., the heavens and earth] any gods besides Allāh, they both would have been ruined. So exalted is Allāh, the Lord of the Throne, above what they describe.

senses.gloss: no more than; nothing more than; nothing but or no one but; only, but

examples.text: الصِّحَّةُ تَاجٌ عَلَى رُؤُوسِ الْأَصِحَّاءِ لَا يَرَاهُ إِلَّا الْمَرْضَى.
examples.english: Health is a crown that is on the heads of the healthy, which only the ill can see.

examples.text: إِنْ هُوَ إِلاَّ ذِكْرٌ لِّلْعَالَمِينَ 27 لِمَن شَاء مِنكُمْ أَن يَسْتَقِيمَ 28 وَمَا تَشَاؤُونَ إِلاَّ أَن يَشَاء اللَّهُ رَبُّ الْعَالَمِينَ 29
examples.english: 27 This is but a reminder to the worlds, 28 to those of you who wish to straighten out themselves, 29 and you never wish it except when God wishes it, the Lord of the Worlds.

senses.gloss: except (for), save (for), but (for), barring; other than, besides, apart from

examples.text:
مولاي إني ببابك قد بسطت يدي
من لي ألوذ به إلاك يا سندي
examples.english:
My Lord, I sit at your door, with arms outspread.
Who is there for me to whom I may flee,
Save for you, my prop?

senses.gloss: no more than; nothing more than; nothing but or no one but; only, but

etymology.text: Cognate with Ge'ez አላ (ʾälla), Hebrew אֶלָּא (ʾellā).
